$comment: LIB-FIXTURES — expected archive-index entries the indexer should emit for the Acme Cosmos fixture library AFTER folder-sort (release-spec §1.5 folder-sort Images/Videos/AI-generated; §7.8 archive index; schemas/artifacts/archive-index-entry.schema.json). Each object validates against that schema (additionalProperties:false). Paths are $CONTENT_HOME-relative and reflect the post-sort layout (DD-21 manual/authored shape). LIB-CORE produces description/tags/type/duration from the recorded vision-responses.json; source_class is inferred from the sort bucket (Images/Videos => library, AI-generated => generated). Two entries (mascot-orbit-loop, st1-on-table) carry the optional character_refs / approval_lineage / usage_history fields so the indexer's full emit path is exercised. This is a golden-output fixture for an exact-match assertion in LIB-CORE tests; it is NOT loaded by the indexer at runtime. ALL SYNTHETIC.

assets.description: First-quarter Moon with craters sharp along the terminator against a black sky. Synthetic placeholder asset.
Jupiter as a bright disk with four small Galilean moons in a line beside it, eyepiece framing. Synthetic placeholder asset.
The Acme Cosmos ST-1 tabletop reflector telescope set up on a picnic table at dusk, red-dot finder visible. Synthetic product placeholder asset.
Wide low-power view of the Orion Nebula in the sword of Orion, faint greenish glow. Synthetic placeholder asset.
Slow pan across the Pleiades open cluster, a tight dipper of blue-white stars filling a low-power field. Synthetic placeholder clip.
Timelapse of an Acme Cosmos telescope being assembled on a patio as the sky darkens. Synthetic placeholder clip.
AI-generated stylized nebula key-art in deep purples and teal, no embedded text. Synthetic generated placeholder asset.
Looping animation of the Acme Cosmos mascot character orbiting a small planet. Synthetic generated placeholder loop.
